name: pathfinder
description: UI test coverage mapping - discover user journeys, visualize test coverage with Mermaid flowcharts, and generate framework-correct UI tests

plugins.name: pathfinder
plugins.description: Maps user journeys, visualizes UI test coverage with Mermaid flowcharts, and generates framework-correct E2E tests. Supports Playwright, Cypress, Maestro, Detox, XCUITest, Espresso, and Flutter.
